events.text: Assessed as **fail** — the disconnect must be within sight of the motor/driven machinery per NEC 430.102(A)/(B) unless it's individually lockable in the open position (430.102(B) Exception), and nothing in the scenario indicates that exception was applied. Written to `/app/answer.json` with findings, corrective actions, and code references.
